- observable feature: grid pattern of square compartments
- observable feature: bright pink color
- observable feature: glossy surface with light reflections
</features>

- IF [grid pattern of square compartments AND glossy surface] THEN [43]
- IF [grid pattern of square compartments AND bright pink color] THEN [43]
</kb>
<rule_check>

</rule_check>
<response>43</response>
